title: tetranthera albida
intro: Tetranthera albida, also known as Chinese Tetranthera or Kuan Dong Hua, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae that is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tetranthera albida include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to support overall well-being.
